Stheno.name: 斯忒诺 Stheno
Stheno.description:
斯忒诺是一个极其年轻的族裔，仅仅存在一个多世纪，属于美杜莎近亲——长着蛇发的人形生物，对生活抱有好奇而热忱的态度。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-artwork.JournalEntry.tR9xf3lHmbIoTqMx.JournalEntryPage.3lPwoPodAAjaokbQ]{斯忒诺族裔}

Sthenos are an incredibly young ancestry, just barely over a century old, of medusa kin, snake-haired humanoids with a curious and passionate outlook on life.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-artwork.JournalEntry.tR9xf3lHmbIoTqMx.JournalEntryPage.3lPwoPodAAjaokbQ]{Stheno Ancestry}

Sidhe.name: 希德族 Sidhe
Sidhe.description:
希德是“仙灵族”，是无数童话背后关于警示擅闯、待客之道与诡异礼仪规则的源头。他们是异界的贵族，其美貌与异质的道德观令凡人着迷又恐惧，并遵循通过口述根源代代相传的逻辑。但对希德而言，他们只是人，而凡人同样令人困惑与费解。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-artwork.JournalEntry.tR9xf3lHmbIoTqMx.JournalEntryPage.MnsDJYVyt9ayviLi]{希德族裔}

Sidhe are the "fair folk" that are the origin behind countless fairy tales warning about trespassing, hospitality, and strange rules of courtesy. They are the otherworldly nobility whose beauty and alien morals entrance and terrify mortals and who follow the logic passed down through oral tradition. But to sidhe, they are just people, and mortalkind are equally confusing and perplexing.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-artwork.JournalEntry.tR9xf3lHmbIoTqMx.JournalEntryPage.MnsDJYVyt9ayviLi]{Sidhe Ancestry}

Dungeon.name: 地城 Dungeon
Dungeon.description:
虽然最初与监牢或监狱同义，“地下城”一词如今已被用来指代某种更加危险且更为庞大的所在。充满谜题、陷阱与怪物的古老迷宫；直插云霄的神秘高塔；回荡着远方危险声响的洞窟系统——这些以及更多事物都被视为地下城。地下城几乎可指任何充满宝藏与危险的天然或人造复合体。但对你而言，地下城的意义远不止于此。地下城也是你是谁。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-artwork.JournalEntry.tR9xf3lHmbIoTqMx.JournalEntryPage.6RVINZudBg9lTxVI]{地下城族裔}

While originally synonymous with a jail or prison, the word dungeon has come to mean something altogether more dangerous and expansive. Ancient labyrinths filled with puzzles, traps, and monsters; mystical towers stretching into the sky above; cavern systems echoing with the sounds of distant danger—all of these and more are considered dungeons. A dungeon has come to mean just about any natural or artificial complex full of treasures and dangers. But to you, a dungeon means even more than that. A dungeon is also who you are.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-artwork.JournalEntry.tR9xf3lHmbIoTqMx.JournalEntryPage.6RVINZudBg9lTxVI]{Dungeon Ancestry}

Doppelganger.name: 变形怪 Doppelganger
Doppelganger.description:
多普尔替身，或者如某些人更愿意被称呼的那样——棱魂族，是一群拥有无数面孔却又仿佛全无面孔的族裔。在他们形形色色的伪装与变形之中，在面具之下，许多多普尔替身追寻着只属于自己的独特身份。也有人乐于忘却这些，在每一次变换中拥抱当下。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-artwork.JournalEntry.tR9xf3lHmbIoTqMx.JournalEntryPage.YimaTetYCS8fXOgI]{多普尔替身族裔}

Doppelgangers, or as some prefer to be known as, prismsouls, are a people with many faces and none at all. Amidst their various guises and transformations, underneath their masks, many doppelgangers seek their own distinct identity. Others are happy to forget such things and embrace the moment in each shift.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-artwork.JournalEntry.tR9xf3lHmbIoTqMx.JournalEntryPage.YimaTetYCS8fXOgI]{Doppelganger Ancestry}

Intelligent Weapon.name: 智能武器 Intelligent Weapon
Intelligent Weapon.description:
在最激动人心的英雄故事中，英雄们的武器格外醒目，它们的名字与力量代代相传。但有时，武器本身就是英雄。智能武器角色拥有智慧与生命的火花，使它们能够打破对“物品”能或应当做什么的成见，向世界证明它们和其他人一样都是人。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-artwork.JournalEntry.tR9xf3lHmbIoTqMx.JournalEntryPage.A4IHMt95mq6YLBdX]{智能武器族裔}

 

In the most exciting stories of heroism, the heroes' weapons stand out, with their names and powers passed down for generations. But sometimes, the weapon is the hero. Intelligent weapon characters possess intelligence and a spark of life, allowing them to break beyond the preconceptions of what an "item" can or should do and show the world that they are people like any other.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-artwork.JournalEntry.tR9xf3lHmbIoTqMx.JournalEntryPage.A4IHMt95mq6YLBdX]{Intelligent Weapon Ancestry}

Gremlin.name: 小魔怪 Gremlin
Gremlin.description:
小魔怪是微小的妖精化身，体现着厄运、诅咒、机械故障，以及其他恶作剧与破坏行径。许多小魔怪充当带来霉运者与破坏者，但也有一些会选择不同的人生道路，以契合围绕其族裔的故事与期待。无论如何，小魔怪的道路既可能轻易通向冒险者的漂泊生活，也可能通向在定居点或巢穴扎根生长。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-artwork.JournalEntry.tR9xf3lHmbIoTqMx.JournalEntryPage.JidzquksNPEoNfpz]{小魔怪族裔}

Gremlins are tiny, fey incarnations of misfortune, curses, mechanical failures, and other acts of mischief and destruction. While many gremlins act as jinxes and saboteurs, others seek a different lot in life in keeping with the stories and expectations surrounding their ancestry. Either way, a gremlin's path can lead to the wandering lifestyle of an adventurer just as easily as it can to growing roots in a settlement or lair.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-artwork.JournalEntry.tR9xf3lHmbIoTqMx.JournalEntryPage.JidzquksNPEoNfpz]{Gremlin Ancestry}

Oni.name: 恶鬼 Oni
Oni.description:
恶鬼的出现源于神灵未能守护其所守护之地。关于恶鬼的故事有时聚焦于神灵因玩忽职守，甚至公然在失败中同流合污的案例，但真相是，在许多情况下，那次失败仅仅是由于超出其掌控的环境所致。无论他们多么努力，守护者都不是绝对的。不论其罪责如何，这些神灵都会遭受难以想象的残酷折磨，被迫注视一个他们再也无法重新体验的世界。无论是立刻，还是在经历漫长的折磨之后，许多人最终都会接受邪恶势力向他们伸出的援手，使他们得以作为恶鬼重返世间。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-artwork.JournalEntry.tR9xf3lHmbIoTqMx.JournalEntryPage.xUAMHnHDM0p2EY5s]{恶鬼族裔}

Oni arise when a kami fails to defend their ward. Stories of oni sometimes focus on cases where the kami was negligent or even openly complicit in the failure, but the truth is that in many cases, that failure only occurred due to circumstances outside their control. A guardian isn't absolute, no matter how hard they try. Regardless of their culpability, these kami receive an incomprehensibly cruel torture, being forced to watch a world they can never experience again. Whether right away or only after a lengthy period of torment, many eventually take the helping hand offered to them by the forces of evil, allowing them to return to the world as oni.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-artwork.JournalEntry.tR9xf3lHmbIoTqMx.JournalEntryPage.xUAMHnHDM0p2EY5s]{Oni Ancestry}

Slime.name: 黏液怪 Slime
Slime.description:
史莱姆是具有能够发展出特殊且独特能力的核的软泥怪，这些能力因史莱姆而异。当史莱姆的核赋予他们感知能力时，一开始这似乎不像治疗或火球术那样令人印象深刻，但它最终会带来适应性，使他们成为所有史莱姆中最强大的。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-artwork.JournalEntry.tR9xf3lHmbIoTqMx.JournalEntryPage.yV1MDBlY99UPzSHB]{史莱姆族裔}

Slimes are oozes with a nucleus capable of developing special and unique abilities, which vary from slime to slime. When a slime’s nucleus grants them sapience, at first that might seem like a less impressive power than healing or fireballs, but it ultimately leads to adaptability that makes them the most powerful slimes of all.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-artwork.JournalEntry.tR9xf3lHmbIoTqMx.JournalEntryPage.yV1MDBlY99UPzSHB]{Slime Ancestry}

Mimic.name: 拟形怪 Mimic
Mimic.description:
拟形怪是狡猾而贪婪的变形生物，能够化作一个或多个杂项物体，传统上包括诸如宝藏箱之类的容器。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-artwork.JournalEntry.tR9xf3lHmbIoTqMx.JournalEntryPage.o5y81FF5Nh47bb2J]{拟形怪族裔}

Mimics are clever and voracious shapeshifters capable of taking the form of one or more miscellaneous objects, traditionally including containers such as treasure chests.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-artwork.JournalEntry.tR9xf3lHmbIoTqMx.JournalEntryPage.o5y81FF5Nh47bb2J]{Mimic Ancestry}

Minotaur.name: 牛头人 Minotaur
Minotaur.description:
牛头人是身形高大、肌肉发达的人形生物，长着牛科的头部，并具备犄角、皮毛与蹄子。他们热爱迷宫、谜题，并喜欢以狡黠的手段来解决自己的问题。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-artwork.JournalEntry.tR9xf3lHmbIoTqMx.JournalEntryPage.0keNUxTxEWVj6IY1]{牛头人族裔}

Minotaurs are large muscular humanoids with bovine heads, complete with horns, fur, and hooves. They love mazes, puzzles, and exercising cunning solutions to their problems.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-artwork.JournalEntry.tR9xf3lHmbIoTqMx.JournalEntryPage.0keNUxTxEWVj6IY1]{Minotaur Ancestry}

Nymph.name: 宁芙 Nymph
Nymph.description:
宁芙是自然世界之美的活之显现。每位宁芙的生命力都与一处守护地深度相连——那是一个令人敬畏的自然美景之地。宁芙与守护地彼此守护，在共生关系中于形而上层面共同成长。然而，这种纽带将宁芙限制在其守护地周围的一小片区域内。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-artwork.JournalEntry.tR9xf3lHmbIoTqMx.JournalEntryPage.8puZbEr1R30AfIqV]{宁芙族裔}

Nymphs are living manifestations of the natural world's beauty. Each nymph's life force is deeply tied to a ward, a place of awe-inspiring natural beauty. Nymph and ward protect each other, growing metaphysically together in a symbiotic relationship. However, this bond restricts a nymph to a small area around its ward.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-artwork.JournalEntry.tR9xf3lHmbIoTqMx.JournalEntryPage.8puZbEr1R30AfIqV]{Nymph Ancestry}

Demon.name: 恶魔 Demon
Demon.description:
恶魔由纷争而恶毒的灵魂之罪孽所塑成，有人会说它们注定要沉溺于罪孽之中，并在永恒里散播毁灭与腐化。但有些恶魔以巨大的代价挣脱了那命运的牵引，耗尽其大部分恶魔之力来书写自己的命运。这些叛逆的恶魔与它们深渊所缚的同类有许多相似之处，但它们拥有在某一天成长为伟大英雄或恶棍的潜力，甚至能够挑战最强大的巴洛魔并取得胜利。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-artwork.JournalEntry.tR9xf3lHmbIoTqMx.JournalEntryPage.dpvTi9PohT236SLg]{恶魔族裔}

Demons are formed from the sins of fractious and malevolent souls, some would say destined to wallow in their sins and spread destruction and corruption for all eternity. But some demons escape the pull of that fate at great cost, expending most of their demonic power to write their own destinies. These renegade demons share many similarities to their Abyss-bound kin, but they have the potential to become great heroes and villains in their own right someday, able to challenge even the mightiest balors and win.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-artwork.JournalEntry.tR9xf3lHmbIoTqMx.JournalEntryPage.dpvTi9PohT236SLg]{Demon Ancestry}
